scene_description:
**Foreground to Background Description:**  

**Foreground:**  
- **Left foreground:** Dense green vegetation (bushes, tall grass) with several short, dark wooden posts (approximately 30–40 cm tall) embedded in the ground, spaced along the edge of a dirt shoulder.  
- **Center foreground:** Paved asphalt road with a **double yellow solid line** running down the center (line color: yellow; solid, no breaks). The left edge of the road has a narrow, unpaved dirt shoulder (light brown, gravelly surface).  
- **Right foreground:** A light gray concrete curb runs parallel to the right edge of the road, adjacent to a sloped hillside covered in dense green and dry brown vegetation (tall grass, shrubs).  

**Mid-ground:**  
- **Center mid-ground:** The road curves slightly to the right; the double yellow solid line continues. A narrow dirt path branches off to the left (left mid-ground), leading into dense green vegetation.  
- **Right mid-ground:** A **diamond-shaped yellow warning sign** (pictogram: black curved arrow indicating a right curve ahead) is mounted on a small pole along the road’s right edge. The sign has a yellow background with no text (only the pictogram).  
- **Left mid-ground:** The dirt shoulder extends, bordered by dense green vegetation (bushes, trees) and the short dark wooden posts. The area is lush with greenery.  

**Background:**  
- **Center background:** The road continues into the distance, curving toward a valley. Distant hills covered in dense green vegetation (bushes, trees) rise on both sides.  
- **Sky:** Partly cloudy with large, white, puffy clouds against a blue sky.  

**Infrastructure Details:**  
- **Utility poles:** A single power line (black wire) spans the top left of the image; the pole is not visible (only the wire is seen).  
- **Bollards:** The short dark wooden posts on the left (left foreground/mid-ground) are unmarked (no color bands or reflectors), approximately 30–40 cm tall.  
- **Street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, guardrails:** None visible.  

**Text & Signs:**  
- The yellow warning sign (right mid-ground) is diamond-shaped, yellow background, with a black curved arrow pictogram (no text).  

**Vehicles & Plates:**  
- No vehicles or license plates visible.  

**Road Surface & Markings:**  
- Main road: Smooth asphalt with a **double yellow solid line** (no dashed sections) in the center.  
- Curb: Light gray concrete on the right side.  
- Shoulder: Unpaved dirt (light brown) on the left.  
- Driving side: Not determinable (no vehicles or lane markings indicating direction).  

**Buildings & Architecture:**  
- No buildings, structures, or architectural features visible.  

**Vegetation & Terrain:**  
- **Left side:** Dense green vegetation (bushes, trees, tall grass) with the short wooden posts.  
- **Right side:** Steep, grassy hillside with mixed green (wet) and brown (dry) vegetation.  
- **Background:** Hilly terrain with thick greenery covering the hills, under a partly cloudy sky.

details.name: yellow warning sign
details.reason: A yellow diamond-shaped sign with a black arrow pictogram is a specific road signage style.
details.focused_description: The yellow warning sign is diamond - shaped, with a bright yellow background and a black curved arrow indicating a right turn. The sign has no visible text. It appears to be made of a rigid material (likely metal or plastic) and is mounted on a pole. The sign shows no significant damage or wear, with clear markings.

details.name: double yellow line
details.reason: The presence of a continuous double yellow line is a distinct road marking feature.
details.focused_description: The double yellow line consists of two parallel, straight, yellow-painted lines on the asphalt road. The lines are slightly faded in sections, indicating wear, and run continuously along the center of the road. The paint color is a muted yellow with visible weathering; the lines maintain consistent width with minor variations due to aging.

details.name: wooden posts
details.reason: Small, unmarked wooden posts used as road edging can be a regional identifier.
details.focused_description: A weathered wooden post with a grayish-brown color, rectangular shape, vertical orientation, and rough texture. The top edge appears flat and slightly darker. No visible text.
